dialogos.texto_en: Well, off the top of my head,\nthat's all I can think of.
Hmm, I see. That's quite helpful.\nThank you very much.
What are the two of you talking about?
Wha?!\nU-Uesugi-kun?!
Wh-when did you...get here?
Just now.\nWhat's going on? Were you talking about something\nyou don't want to be overheard?
N-n-n-not at all, you know?
You totally just freaked out, though.
I didn't!\nWe were just having a casual conversation!
The more you deny it,\nthe more you dig your own grave, you know?
Ooohh...
Well, since it seems like we can't hide it anymore,\nis it okay if we tell him?
Raiha-chan...
Well, I mean, if you really don't want to,\nyou don't have to say anything.
That's not it...
You can do it, Itsuki-san!
I was having Raiha-chan tell me\nwhat you like or would want.
Big bro, aren't you reacting a bit too calmly?
Well, even if you say that, \nwhy do you want to know, Itsuki?
Mmh... Are you saying that on purpose?
It's not on purpose, I honestly don't know.
You're so insensitive, big bro.
Huh?
Itsuki-san, you should tell him the reason why.
...There's only one reason.\nYour birthday is coming up soon.
I was asking Raiha-chan for advice\non what kind of present to give you.
I-I see.\nSorry, I wasn't reading the atmosphere at all.
Now that it's out in the open,\nI'll just ask you directly.
What kind of present\nwould you like for your birthday this year?
Let's see%p-2;――
(Something I want...\n I can't think of anything off the top of my head.)
...Anything is fine.
Big brooo...\nThis isn't the dinner menu, you know?
No, I'm...sorry, too.\nI shouldn't have asked you point blank.
But, I'm really at a loss here.\nI have no experience giving gifts to men.
Well, you've given one to me before.\nLast year for my birthday.
Ah...
Yes, but that was a little different.\nWhat I mean is that...
(...What does she mean?)
This involves you directly, big bro.
You really don't need to worry about it.\nI don't mind whatever you want to give me.
But, I want you to be happy about it.
And then I started to wonder\nwhat kind of things men would like.\nI even thought about asking Dad...
Please don't.
I-I won't.
This involves you directly, big bro.
Then, I...
Yes, well... It's just that it's the first time\nI'm giving something to you \nthat has a special meaning, Uesugi-kun.
So, I'm having trouble deciding.\nI want you to be happy,\nand I want it to be something you like.
...I see.
Big bro, you look happy.
Ooh...
This involves you directly, big bro.
Well, because I'm the one receiving the gift, you know.
That's not what I meant, though.
After your birthday is over, big bro,\nit'll be Itsuki-san's birthday next, won't it?
Big bro, you should think about\nwhat kind of present to get her too.
(Oh, right. Their birthdays are on May 5th!)
(This will be Itsuki's first birthday present\n since we started to date.\n It's definitely a tough decision...!)
Ah, you're worrying, aren't you?
...I now understand exactly how you feel, Itsuki.
Right?\nIt's hard to make such a decision so easily.
Ugghh...\nYour birthday will be here before I know it.
Don't you want to know\nwhat I want as a present?
No, I don't plan on asking.
I want to figure it out for myself.\nIf I choose something after struggling with it,\nthen I won't regret whatever reaction you give.
Once again, you've taught me something.
Hm?
I'll struggle with it until the last minute too.\nI'll choose something wonderful,\nso please look forward to it.
Same goes for me. I'll choose something\nthat will make you happy.\nYou better get excited.
Okay!
